name: Pancakes
description: Classic, fluffy pancakes with easy steps using simple ingredients.
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, egg, melted butter, and vanilla (if using).
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined; lumps are ok—do not overmix.
Heat a nonstick skillet or griddle over medium to medium-high heat. Lightly grease with butter or oil.
Scoop about ¼ cup of batter per pancake onto the skillet. Cook until you see bubbles form and the edges look set, 1-2 minutes, then flip and cook until golden, another 1-2 minutes.
Serve warm with syrup, butter, or your favorite toppings.
